I live a non-traditional, nomadic lifestyle by choice—one shaped by resilience, Self Perception, and a deep commitment to service. I’m currently building two aligned projects: one to empower other women to build income on the road, and another to create a charitable community for nomadic women like me. I appreciated the depth of the questions, but some of the options felt limited for people living outside of conventional systems. Still, I’m glad I took the time—it helped me reflect on the mission I’m building every day.
